subject: Circhester Bath — an indoor hot spring or swimming pool facility with blue-green water and minimal architecture
description: An interior view of a large indoor pool or hot spring bath. The water is calm and rendered in soft blue-green tones. The facility has clean, minimalist architecture with pale walls and what appear to be lane markers or pool borders. No figures are present. The atmosphere is quiet and serene — a spa or athletic bath facility. Overhead lighting gives the water a cool, soothing glow.
foreground: Calm blue-green pool or hot spring water with lane borders
background: Pale indoor pool hall walls and ceiling, minimal architectural detail
